Italian language strings and translation data for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[lang_map.json](lang_map.json.md)**: Defines language strings and font metadata for the Italian locale in the Pebble firmware.
- **[tintin.po](tintin.po.md)**: Italian translation strings for Pebble firmware, including messages for app notifications, settings, and system prompts.
